title: GTA 6 breaks pre-order records and fuels dispute between Microsoft and Sony over Xbox and PS5 sales
summary: Microsoft questions claims that the game's pre-orders are much higher on PlayStation 5, while speculators are already reselling pre-orders.

title: Class action lawsuit accuses Samsung, SK Hynix and Micron of manipulating the RAM market
summary: The three major memory manufacturers face legal action for alleged price fixing and anticompetitive behavior in the chip market.

title: Nintendo will hold a Direct dedicated to Splatoon Raiders on June 30
summary: The Japanese company will offer a live stream focused on its upcoming shooter, with gameplay reveals and news.

title: Netflix announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 for fall 2026 with a new trailer
summary: The second season of the Cyberpunk 2077 animated series will arrive this fall and feature a new team of mercenaries in Night City.

title: Sony warns PlayStation 6 will be expensive and will not be sold at a loss
summary: The company plans a high price for the PS6 to avoid significant losses, with an estimated manufacturing cost of $1,000.

title: Sony reaffirms commitment to games as a service despite cancellations and cuts
summary: PlayStation CEO insists on revitalizing the live-service genre, despite having cancelled eight of twelve projects planned for 2025.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls adds Blade, Deadpool and Loki and announces open beta
summary: Marvel's fighting game expands its roster with three iconic characters and prepares a beta for PS5 and PC.

title: Bob joins Tekken 8 as downloadable character in August
summary: The popular fighter returns to the saga and will be available on August 19 for season pass holders.

title: Sega reveals Bakunawa Killer, an enigmatic fighter for Virtua Fighter Crossroads
summary: The new character, shrouded in mystery, sparks all kinds of speculation among the gaming community.

title: CD Projekt unifies its identity under the CD Projekt Red brand
summary: The Polish studio simplifies its corporate structure by merging all its divisions into a single brand, although the developer keeps its name.

title: RAM prices could increase up to 50% in the third quarter of 2026
summary: Analysts predict continued increases in memory costs, which will make gaming hardware more expensive.

title: Valve's Steam Machine faces speculation and doubts about its real performance
summary: Pre-orders are being resold at high prices while Valve withdraws the promise of 4K at 60 FPS after criticism.

title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 surpasses 6 million copies sold
summary: Warhorse Studios' RPG continues its successful trajectory in the global market.

title: 2XKO adds Lux and Samira from League of Legends to its fighter roster
summary: Riot Games expands the offering of its upcoming fighting game with two popular champions.

title: Angry Birds 3 trailer stands out for its scatological humor with abundant urine
summary: The third movie in the franchise shows a trailer that prioritizes crude humor over action.

title: Meccha Chameleon becomes a phenomenon with over 10 million copies sold
summary: The stealth and camouflage game is a sales hit and fans recreate its mechanics in real life.

title: Star Fox leads sales on Switch 2 eShop and receives high scores
summary: The remake of the classic shooter is a sales success and is well-received by critics and players.

title: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round rereleases with hundreds of DLCs and forces re-purchase of content
summary: The new version of the fighting game is heavily criticized on Steam for its payment policies and delisting of the original.

title: Xbox Game Pass halts new deals with third parties and loses eight games
summary: Microsoft's subscription service modifies its catalog and strategy for partnerships with external developers.

title: Pokémon TCG raises prices and its developer receives million-dollar government subsidies
summary: The Pokémon Company increases the cost of its most demanded products while DeNA receives subsidies worth 1.5 billion yen.
